#clean #howto #trending #cleanwithme
I love giving and helping people, whether you see it or not… it’s always happening ❤️
items.transcript: People always tell me that I only clean houses for free for people in need because I get to post them on social media. However, if that were true, then why would I have cleaned over 30 plus houses without posting them? Yes, you heard that right. My husband and I used to clean a lot of houses for free and you never saw a single thing about them. And that is because I truly enjoy what I do. I love helping. That is literally my favorite thing on earth. I never even filmed those 30 plus houses. In reality, it's more like 36, 37 houses if my memory serves me right. But something I have understood is that when you post your life on social media, you can't really control the narrative.

items.caption:
Disney and @scrubdaddy how could it get any better!!! 
•

items.transcript: All right, now let's open this. I'm so excited. I've been waiting for this. You have no idea. Oh my god, Minnie and Mickey. That is so cool. I love that they started with this. Okay, so I assume there's like another level. Oh my god, Toy Story. Look at this. Look at Woody. The little alien and then Buzz Lightyear. So cool. And last, Stitch. Oh my god, my sister is obsessed with Stitch. I'm definitely gonna have to give her one. It's Stitch. Okay, so these are Scrub Daddies. These are all Scrub Mummies. And then these right here is, this is Scrub Daddy and then this is Scrub Mummy. I do prefer the Scrub Mummy, but they're all amazing. I'm so excited.

items.caption:
Always remember to dust before you clean your mirrors/glass!
•
#clean #cleantok #trending #cleanwithme
items.transcript: Hey, it's your favorite housekeeper here just to remind you that every time you clean a glass door or even a mirror, you want to dust them first before cleaning them. This will ensure that you're left with no streaks and you have a super perfect finish. It's one of those things that you don't notice a difference until you do it the right way and then you're like, oh!

items.transcript: Hey, housekeeper here. Did you know that you don't need a thousand cleaning products to clean something as simple as a countertop or a table? For this right here, I'm using just a little bit of Dawn Power Wash, a sponge, and a damp microfiber towel to rinse everything off. That is all I needed and that is all I used. Now like and follow for more cleaning tips. How pretty!
